name: brndle/pull-quote
title: Pull Quote
description: Editorial pull quote with three variants: bordered-left, centered-large, and outset.

variations.name: bordered-left
variations.title: Bordered left
variations.description: Classic editorial pull quote with an accent rule on the left.

variations.name: centered-large
variations.title: Centered display
variations.description: Full-width centered quote with a decorative open-quote glyph.

variations.name: outset
variations.title: Outset
variations.description: Breaks out of the article column for added emphasis on long-form features.

attributes.quote: The best designs are the ones you don't notice — until you try to imagine the product without them.
